description: Move the plugin version display from the icon tooltip to the three-dot menu (matching the Browser tools pattern), and clean up icon tooltips to be purely action-oriented: 'Open {name}' for 1 tab, 'Open {name} (N tabs)' for multiple, 'Open {name} in new tab' for closed-with-fallback, and no tooltip when not clickable.

userStories.title: Add version to PluginMenu and remove from icon tooltip
userStories.description: Add a disabled version menu item to PluginMenu (matching BrowserToolsMenu pattern), and update PluginCard's icon tooltip to be purely action-oriented — removing the version fallback for non-clickable icons.
acceptanceCriteria: PluginMenu shows a disabled 'v{version}' menu item at the top of the menu content, above the Update item
The version menu item uses the Package icon from lucide-react and text-muted-foreground styling
The version menu item has a Menu.Separator below it to visually separate it from action items
PluginCard icon tooltip no longer shows 'v{version}' in any state
When tabState has 1 tab, tooltip shows 'Open {displayName}'
When tabState has N>1 tabs, tooltip shows 'Open {displayName} (N tabs)'
When tabState is closed with homepage or lastSeenUrl, tooltip shows 'Open {displayName} in new tab'
When icon is not clickable (closed, no homepage, no lastSeenUrl), no tooltip is rendered
PluginMenu stories updated to show the version menu item
PluginCard stories updated to reflect new tooltip text
userStories.notes:
Files:
- platform/browser-extension/src/side-panel/components/PluginMenu.tsx (add version item)
- platform/browser-extension/src/side-panel/components/PluginCard.tsx (update tooltip logic)
- platform/browser-extension/src/side-panel/components/PluginMenu.stories.tsx (update stories)
- platform/browser-extension/src/side-panel/components/PluginCard.stories.tsx (update stories)

Context:

BrowserToolsMenu (BrowserToolsMenu.tsx:26-30) already has the pattern we want:
```tsx
<Menu.Content align="end">
  <Menu.Item disabled className="text-muted-foreground">
    <Server className="h-3.5 w-3.5" />
    Server {serverVersion ? `v${serverVersion}` : 'unknown'}
  </Menu.Item>
</Menu.Content>
```

PluginMenu (PluginMenu.tsx:51-65) currently has:
```tsx
<Menu.Content align="end">
  {plugin.update && (
    <Menu.Item onClick={onUpdate}>
      {updating ? <Loader size="sm" /> : <ArrowUpCircle className="h-3.5 w-3.5" />}
      Update to v{plugin.update.latestVersion}
    </Menu.Item>
  )}
  {plugin.update && <Menu.Separator />}
  <Menu.Item
    onSelect={() => setConfirmOpen(true)}
    className="text-destructive ...">
    ...
  </Menu.Item>
</Menu.Content>
```

PluginCard icon tooltip (PluginCard.tsx:149-154) currently has:
```tsx
const tooltipText = (() => {
  if (plugin.tabState === 'closed') {
    return hasHomepage ? `Open ${plugin.displayName} in new tab` : `v${plugin.version}`;
  }
  return tabCount > 1 ? `Open ${plugin.displayName} (${tabCount} tabs)` : `Open ${plugin.displayName}`;
})();
```

Changes:

1. **PluginMenu.tsx** — Add version item at the top of Menu.Content:
```tsx
import { ArrowUpCircle, MoreHorizontal, Package, Trash2 } from 'lucide-react';
```
(Add `Package` to the lucide-react import.)

Inside Menu.Content, add before the update item:
```tsx
<Menu.Item disabled className="text-muted-foreground">
  <Package className="h-3.5 w-3.5" />
  v{plugin.version}
</Menu.Item>
<Menu.Separator />
```

This means the menu structure becomes:
- v0.1.0 (disabled, muted)
- --- separator ---
- Update to v0.2.0 (only if update available)
- --- separator --- (only if update available)
- Remove/Uninstall (destructive)

2. **PluginCard.tsx** — Rewrite the tooltipText computation. When not clickable, don't render a tooltip at all. Replace lines 149-154:
```tsx
const tooltipText = isClickable
  ? plugin.tabState === 'closed'
    ? `Open ${plugin.displayName} in new tab`
    : tabCount > 1
      ? `Open ${plugin.displayName} (${tabCount} tabs)`
      : `Open ${plugin.displayName}`
  : undefined;
```

Then in the JSX, conditionally render the Tooltip. When tooltipText is undefined, render the button without the Tooltip wrapper:
```tsx
{tooltipText ? (
  <Tooltip>
    <Tooltip.Trigger asChild>
      <button ... aria-label={tooltipText}>
        <PluginIcon ... />
      </button>
    </Tooltip.Trigger>
    <Tooltip.Content>{tooltipText}</Tooltip.Content>
  </Tooltip>
) : (
  <button ... disabled>
    <PluginIcon ... />
  </button>
)}
```
The disabled button without tooltip avoids showing empty tooltip on hover. The aria-label is only set when the button is clickable.

3. **PluginMenu.stories.tsx** — All existing stories will show the version item automatically since they all pass a plugin with `version: '0.1.0'`. Add one story that verifies the version is visible in the menu:
- `VersionInMenu`: A story with `play` function that opens the menu and asserts `v0.1.0` is visible.

4. **PluginCard.stories.tsx** — Update the existing `TabClosed` story. The icon should now have no tooltip (since no homepage/lastSeenUrl in the basic mock). Update any story assertions that check for tooltip text. Ensure the `ClosedWithHomepage` story (if it exists) shows 'Open Slack in new tab' tooltip. Ensure the `Ready` story shows 'Open Slack' tooltip.

Constraints:
- Do NOT change BrowserToolsMenu — it already works correctly.
- Do NOT move the DEV badge or unreviewed shield icon — those stay in the accordion trigger area.
- The Package icon (from lucide-react) is for the version item. Do NOT use the Server icon — that's for Browser tools.
- The version menu item MUST be disabled (not clickable) — it's informational only.
- The separator after the version item is always present (unlike the update separator which is conditional).
- When the icon is not clickable AND there's no tooltip, do NOT set aria-label to an empty string — just omit it entirely.
- All existing E2E tests that check for tooltip text on plugin icons must still pass. Search for 'Open E2E Test' in e2e/ files to find affected assertions.
